remediation.action: Verify policy intent: Do security, legal, qa agents require Haiku per governance or is this a config drift?
If policy requires Haiku: Update openclaw.json agents.security.model, agents.legal.model, agents.qa.model to anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5
If policy changed (e.g., Sonnet now approved for these agents): Update RULES.md, create CHG ticket, run warden re-check
Run model-drift-check.sh again to confirm clean

context.policyRef: Model strategy A$500/month cap, default Sonnet. Cost-sensitive agents (security, legal, qa) should use Haiku per cost governance
context.costImpact: Sonnet=3.75x cost of Haiku per 1M tokens. Drift may breach A$500/month cap.

nextAction: Yoda to assess + Ken sign-off before remediation
resolution: CHG-0225: Updated security/legal/qa to Haiku in openclaw.json per Ken-approved policy (2026-05-06)
